steps: Go to https://app.deel.com and sign in to your Deel account
Navigate to 'Apps & Integrations' in the left sidebar, then select 'Developer Center'
Select the token type: 'Personal' (tied to your user account) or 'Organization' (service account, never expires)
Enter a name for the token and click 'Next'
In the scopes popup, select the permissions your integration needs
Copy the token immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your Deel Bearer token, sent as Authorization: Bearer <token>

notes: The token is shown only once at generation — save it immediately
Personal tokens expire when the user leaves the company; Organization tokens (service accounts) never expire
Recommend using Organization tokens for production integrations
Scopes are selected at token creation and cannot be modified — regenerate the token to change scopes
Deel's API base URL is https://api.letsdeel.com (not api.deel.com despite the service domain)
A Deel account with appropriate plan is required — no free tier for API access

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve organization details to verify the API token is valid
